mapper.select: SELECT p.playlist_id AS playlistId, p.playlist_name AS playlistName, u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS userName, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.description, p.created_at AS createdAt, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.tag_id ORDER BY t.tag_id) AS tagIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.name ORDER BY t.tag_id) AS tagNames FROM playlist p INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN playlist_tag pt ON p.playlist_id = pt.playlist_id LEFT JOIN tag t ON pt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE p.playlist_id = #{id} GROUP BY p.playlist_id

SELECT p.playlist_id, p.playlist_name, u.user_id, u.nickname user_name, p.cover_url, p.description, p.created_at
FROM playlist_tag pt INNER JOIN playlist p ON pt.playlist_id = p.playlist_id INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId}
FROM playlist p INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id where p.is_default = 0 and p.user_id != 1
ORDER BY p.play_count DESC

SELECT p.playlist_id, p.playlist_name, u.user_id, u.nickname user_name, p.cover_url, p.description, p.created_at FROM playlist p INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE playlist_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY play_count DESC
